project_name: Astra Linux CIS Ansible for OT
task_selection_rule: lowest priority task with passes=false and all dependencies passes=true
completion_rule: passes=true only when technical_passes=true and engineer_approval_status is approved or not_required

tasks.title: Bootstrap Astra Linux CIS Ansible project governance and structure
tasks.comments: Initial PRD, progress log, mirrored repository skeleton, offline assumptions, placeholder scope and required-information files created. No CIS controls implemented. PRD and YAML validation passed locally; ansible-playbook is not installed in this workstation, so Ansible syntax-check is deferred to an environment with Ansible available.

tasks.title: Extract authoritative CIS control scope from linux_cis.xlsx
tasks.comments: This task locks the project scope. No controls outside linux_cis.xlsx may be implemented. Completed earlier in this repository and retained as explicit scope-lock governance task.

tasks.title: Extract and normalize linux_cis.xlsx authoritative control scope
tasks.comments: Extracted 319 dotted CIS rows from linux_cis.xlsx: 265 controls and 54 group headers. Preserved exact sheet names, row numbers, CIS IDs, raw status values, and raw extra cells. Normalized status typos manua/manula to manual and marked 91 blank-status controls as needs_scope_clarification. No controls implemented.

tasks.title: Normalize extracted linux_cis.xlsx scope schema for downstream consumers
tasks.comments: Canonicalized extracted scope into top-level metadata, sheets, controls, and group_headers before ASTRA-0003/ASTRA-0004 consumption. Preserved sheet names, sheet indexes, row numbers, CIS IDs/titles, raw statuses including typos, normalized statuses, raw extra cells, audit hints, comments, record types, implementation classes, and OT safety flags. Remediation remains disabled by default.

tasks.title: Enforce exact canonical control scope schema parity
tasks.comments: Rewrote scope JSON/YAML directly from linux_cis.xlsx to enforce exact canonical metadata, sheet, and record key parity. Controls are only dotted rows whose titles start with Ensure; other dotted rows are group_headers. Blank control status normalizes to needs_scope_clarification; manua/manula normalize to manual; remediation remains disabled by default.

tasks.title: Enforce canonical control scope schema parity
tasks.comments: Rewrote extracted scope to exact canonical schema and deterministic record field types for cross-project parity. No CIS controls implemented.

tasks.title: Map scripts_summary.docx logic to extracted linux_cis.xlsx scope
tasks.comments: Mapped scripts_summary.docx reference logic to extracted linux_cis scope without implementing controls. Discovered 17 source scripts, mapped 257 Excel-scoped controls, and marked 15 helper/group/out-of-scope script items. Captured Debian/Ubuntu, APT/dpkg, systemd, config-file, offline, and OT safety assumptions for downstream Astra design.

tasks.title: Normalize scripts_summary mapping schema parity
tasks.comments: Normalized scripts_summary reference mapping to a shared canonical schema. No controls implemented and no Bash executed.

tasks.title: Define required information for offline industrial execution
tasks.comments: Defined offline OT required-information checklist, production-safe template, lab-only examples, requirement levels, and why_needed metadata for all required groups.

tasks.title: Normalize required-information schema parity
tasks.comments: Normalized required-information files to shared canonical schema with 89 items. No production values added.

tasks.title: Define Astra Linux OS and version mapping files
tasks.comments: Defined conservative Astra-specific OS/version, package, service, path, command, and feature mappings. Values are candidate/untested or unknown unless verified; no controls implemented.

tasks.title: Implement automatic per-host CIS audit checklist output
tasks.comments: Implemented automatic offline-safe per-host checklist generation from linux_cis scope and available audit evidence with chapter grouping and host metadata. Report role now emits JSON and Markdown artifacts under reports/lab/<timestamp>/<host>/ and reports/lab/latest/<host>/ using scope control IDs/titles only; non-scoped controls are excluded. Audit-only defaults remain unchanged. Local PRD and YAML validation passed.

tasks.title: Implement machine-level audit result collation and storage format
tasks.comments: Implemented offline-safe machine-level run collation from per-host checklist JSON with run_manifest.json, flattened run_summary.csv, and run_summary.md under reports/<env>/<timestamp>/ and reports/<env>/latest/. Added optional XML strategy note using built-in junit callback (non-mandatory without ansible-playbook runtime). Database persistence remains deferred as an optional future task gated by explicit approval.

tasks.title: Implement repeat-audit change tracking against previous run
tasks.comments: Implemented offline-safe repeat-audit delta tracking in cis_report by loading per-host baseline from reports/<env>/latest before overwrite (fallback to latest prior timestamp), comparing control status_mark transitions, writing per-host delta.json, and aggregating run_delta_summary.json with changed/new/resolved/unchanged counts per control across hosts. Also extended run summary/manifest/csv outputs with delta references and documented classification method in docs/reporting_strategy.md. PRD validation and YAML parsing passed; ansible-playbook syntax-check remains unavailable in this workstation.

tasks.title: Implement audit-only CIS chapter/group SUDO for Astra Linux
tasks.comments: Implemented audit-only SUDO control rows 5.2.1-5.2.7 with per-control registered evidence and chapter summary facts. Group headers remain non-control and were not implemented. Chapter report generated for lab path; waiting for engineer review/approval workflow. Finalized after engineer approval task ASTRA-3001.

tasks.title: Review implemented CIS chapter/group SUDO for Astra Linux
tasks.comments: Reviewed ASTRA-1001 SUDO implementation for scope/safety/quality and recorded pass verdict. Temporary defaults were explicitly flagged as lab-only and must be replaced by environment-approved allowlists/baselines.

tasks.title: Record engineer approval for CIS chapter/group SUDO for Astra Linux

tasks.title: Finalize SUDO chapter lifecycle after approval
